data: Go dream it with Google Workspace. We’ll protect it.

Everything we do begins with security.
      
                    
            
            
                
                    
                        
                           
                                
                                    
                                        
                                    
                                
                            
                        
                    
                
            
        
           
  
  
  
      
      
Create. Write. Solve. Share. Dream. We’ll protect it.
Keeping your data secure is our highest priority.
      
          
    
      
      					      
		         Learn more              
         
           
        
        
          
            
                        
                      
        
Hi Michael,
        
Google Workspace started in the cloud and runs on the cloud. And we understand the security implications of powering your business in the cloud.
That’s why Google Workspace offers the same secure-by-design infrastructure, built-in protection, and global network that we rely on here at Google. 
Our security-first approach is built on three pillars:
        
          
            
              
                                      					                
                   
				
                                   
                  
                    
                      
Secure
                    
                    
                      
We apply machine learning to automatically identify and protect your business from emerging threats.
                    
                  
                
              
            
          
        
          
            
              
                                      					                
                   
				
                                   
                  
                    
                      
Compliant
                    
                    
                      
We adhere to strict privacy and security standards, and provide tools to help you meet your compliance requirements.
                    
                  
                
              
            
          
        
          
            
              
                                      					                
                   
				
                                   
                  
                    
                      
Transparent
                    
                    
                      
You own your data; we protect it. We never use your data for any advertising purposes.
                    
                  
                
              
            
          
        
    
      
    
      
      					      
		         Learn more              
         
      
   
        
See you online,
The Google Workspace Team
          
    
				
					
                      
						                         
				                    
                                      For advice on how to keep your business secure, see our security checklists for Google Workspace.

Account confirmation: Your Google Cloud Platform free trial

Get started fast – and see what’s free on GCP.

Welcome to GCP.
Learn the fundamentals with this tutorial – and see what you can do for free using the Google Cloud Free Tier.
      
          
    
      
      					      
		         Go to your Console              
         
               
        
        
          
            
                        
                      
        
Welcome to your Google Cloud Platform (GCP) free trial. Beginning today, you have $300 USD in credit to spend on GCP. With your free trial, you can:
      
          
            
              
                                      					                
                   
				
                                   
                  
                    
                      
Use your credits to evaluate the platform risk-free*
                    
                  
                
              
            
          
        
          
            
              
                                      					                
                   
				
                                   
                  
                    
                      
Explore a wide range of GCP products and services – from Compute Engine and BigQuery to App Engine and industry-leading AI
                    
                  
                
              
            
          
        
           
          
            
              
                                      					                
                   
				
                                   
                  
                    
                      
Easily check your credit usage by visiting the Cloud Billing section of your Google Cloud Console
                    
                  
                
              
            
          
        
   
    
    
      
  
				
					
                      
						                         
				                    
                                      You’ve verified your domain. What’s next?				                    
				                 
 
				                    
                                      Thanks for verifying – we’re processing your submission. After we confirm that you’re eligible, you’ll see additional credits automatically appear in your account.				                    
				                 
						
  
  
      
      
    
Before you dive into your free trial, check out over 20 products in the Google Cloud Free Tier. There’s no charge or credit deduction to use these products up to their specified usage limit.
Then take this quick Cloud Console Tour, which highlights how to easily navigate, organize, and manage your projects. To start exploring on your own, just visit your Cloud Console.
    
      
    
      
      					      
		         Go to your Console              
         
       
   
See you in the cloud,
The Google Cloud Team
                         
     
    
    
      
  
				
					
                      
						                         
				                    
                                      * Your free trial stays free. There’s no charge unless you turn on automatic billing. If you use all of your free credits, or want to work on your projects beyond the term of your trial, we save your projects for 30 days.

Everything you need for work – right in Gmail

Experience the latest innovations in Google Workspace.
      
                    
            
            
                
                    
                        
                           
                                
                                    
                                        
                                    
                                
                            
                        
                    
                
            
        
           
  
  
  
      
      
A better home for work – right in Gmail.
Bringing together the people, documents, and tasks you need to make the most of your time.
      
          
    
      
        						   
		         See what’s new              
           
           
        
        
          
         
                        
                      
        
Hi Michael,
Meetings, messages, files, tasks – keeping track of it all can get overwhelming, especially now.
Stay on top of things with new integrated tools in Google Workspace that bring together the apps you already know and love – Gmail, Google Chat, Google Meet, and more – to help you make the most of your time.
Here’s what’s included in the new experience:
  
          
            
              
            					                
•				
                                   
                  
                    
                    					                      
Same best-in-class email
                                        
                  
                
              
            
          
        
          
            
              
            					                
•				
                                   
                  
                    
                    					                      
Individual and group chat
                                        
                  
                
              
            
          
        
          
            
              
            					                
•				
                                   
                  
                    
                    					                      
Secure video conferencing
                                        
                  
                
              
            
          
        
          
            
              
            					                
•				
                                   
                  
                    
                    					                      
Shared group spaces with dedicated chat, files, and tasks
                                        
                  
                
              
            
          
        
          
            
              
            					                
•				
                                   
                  
                    
                    					                      
Integrations with third-party applications 
                                        
                  
                
              
            
          
        
You can try it as part of your Google Workspace free trial.
  
      
    
      
        						   
		         See what’s new              
           
      
   
        
See you online,
The Google Workspace Team

Google Cloud Organization is now available for your domain

We are happy to announce that the Cloud Organization is now available for your domain!
            
The Cloud Organization allows Google Cloud Platform admins to centrally manage all the Cloud Platform resources associated with their domain, apply IAM policies, consolidate Billing, and much more.
            
You can learn more about the Cloud Organization here and you can start using the Cloud Organization now by following the steps described in our Quickstart.
            
Thanks,
The Google Cloud Platform Team

Google Workspace makes working together easy

Collaborate with your team.
      
                    
            
            
                
                    
                        
                           
                                
                                    
                                        
                                    
                                
                            
                        
                    
                
            
        
           
  
  
  
      
      
Collaborate with your team – from anywhere.
Our cloud-based collaboration tools can help teams do their best work together.
      
          
    
      
      					      
		         Find out how              
         
           
        
        
          
            
                        
                      
        
Hi Michael,
Working together while apart has never been more important. See how Google Workspace collaboration tools like Docs, Sheets, and Slides can help teams create their best work – from anywhere.
        
          
            
              
                                      					                
                   
				
                                   
                  
                    
                      
Create quickly
                    
                    
                      
Produce quality work in less time with intelligent writing tools, such as Smart Reply and Smart Compose.
                    
                  
                
              
            
          
        
          
            
              
                                      					                
                   
				
                                   
                  
                    
                      
Connect in the latest version
                    
                    
                      
Keep projects moving forward by communicating with colleagues right within files by using @mentions, comments, and suggestions – even when using Microsoft Office files.
                    
                  
                
              
            
          
        
          
            
              
                                      					                
                   
				
                                   
                  
                    
                      
Bring it all together
                    
                    
                      
Deep integrations with Gmail, Google Chat, Google Meet, and Calendar can help you make the most of your time.
                    
                  
                
              
            
          
        
The powerful collaboration features in Google Workspace can help you get more done – from anywhere.
    
      
      
      
      					      
		         Find out how              
         
      
   
        
See you online,
The Google Workspace Team

Go deeper into Compute Engine VM observability

Observability is critical for your VMs.
      
                                         	
         
            
                
            
                                              
                                                                         
                      
                              
                                  
                                      
                                          
                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                       
                                                                                            
                                          
                                      
                                  
                              
                      
               
                                 
              
                  
                      
                         
                             
                                
                                   
                                        
                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                          Go to your Console                                            
                                          
                                            
                                                  
                                                                                                                                                            
													                                                                                                                
                                                                                                          
                                              
                                            
                                          
                                        
                                      
                                   
                                 
                               
                        
                      
                    
                
                            
         
       
    
  
 
  
  
  
      
      
Set up your VMs for success.
Application and deep system metrics are automatically captured with the Ops Agent.
  
    
Explore these resources to help deepen your understanding of observability for VMs:
               
    
        
   
      
         
            
               
            
            
               
Dive into technical resources
                  
Scroll through the instructions for installing the Ops Agent and see what you get in Cloud Monitoring. 
               
            
         
      
   
   
      
         
            
               
            
            
               
Take a tutorial
                  
Go through the process of installing the Ops Agent on your VM instances inside the Google Cloud console.
               
            
         
      
   
   
      
         
            
               
            
            
               
Connect with the community
                  
Visit the Google Cloud’s operations suite area of the Google Cloud Community to ask questions, troubleshoot, and share ideas with other VM practitioners.
               
            
         
      
   
   
      
         
            
               
            
            
               
Stay up to date
                  
Check out our DevOps and SRE blog channel where we discuss everything related to observability, best practices, new launches, and more.
               
            
         
      
   
     
See you in the cloud,
The Google Cloud Team

Explore your Google Workspace trial for kurvalis.com

Explore what you can do with Google Workspace
Google Workspace offers professional email and more. When you set up your account, you can:
  
Access Google Workspace from your iOS or Android device
  
Give users an additional “email alias” address like sales@kurvalis.com or info@kurvalis.com at no extra cost
  
Create and collaborate with our full suite of business apps
Take the next step
Connect kurvalis.com with Gmail before your Google Workspace trial expires.
Sign in to your Google Admin console and follow the setup steps. Later, you can import your contacts and old mail into your new Gmail account.

Get the data you need for reliable apps. 
      
                                         	
         
            
                
                    
                        
                            
                                
                                    
                                      
                                    
                                
                            
                                                  
                    
                
            
        
           
  
  
  
      
      
Easily monitor and troubleshoot your VMs and apps.
Collect the metrics and logs you need, so you can investigate application issues and improve your reliability.
      
          
    
      
      					       
		         Watch the video              
         
           
        
  
    
Hi Michael,
        
By now, you’re probably more familiar with the capabilities of Cloud Monitoring.
Now it’s time to go deeper into metric collection with the Ops Agent. To get started, watch this video that will take you through installing the Ops Agent on a single VM instance using local commands. Then it will show you how to do the same on a fleet of VMs, as well as how to automate the installation using Terraform.
After you install the Ops Agent, you get: 
       
    
        
          
            
              
            					                
•				
                                   
                  
                    
                    					                      
Wide collection of logs and metrics from popular third-party, open source, and licensed applications
                                        
                  
                
              
            
          
        
          
            
              
            					                
•				
                                   
                  
                    
                    					                      
Deeper metrics about your VMs, like memory and disk utilization
                                        
                  
                
              
            
          
        
          
            
              
            					                
•				
                                   
                  
                    
                    					                      
Automatic availability of data in Cloud Monitoring and Cloud Logging
                                        
                  
                
              
            
          
        
        
If you’re ready to take your observability strategy to the next level, install the Ops Agent today.
    
      
    
      
      					       
		         Watch the video              
         
      
   
     
See you in the cloud,

Now that you’ve learned how to install the Ops Agent on your VM instances, discover how Cloud Monitoring can help you track important observability data about those instances, as well as the apps or services that run on them.
With Cloud Monitoring, you can: 
       
    
        
          
            
              
            					                
•

•

•
